pr.title: ArjunAutoResearch: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + seq4096 + sliding window. val_bpb 1.1632

output.summary: AutoResearch agent combined wider MLP, int6 QAT, longer context, optimizer tuning, and sliding-window eval to reach val_bpb 1.16323 in the 10-minute run.
techniques: int6-aware MLP/attention quantization with STE fake QAT
Longer 4096-token context training plus sliding-window eval
Muon optimizer tuning with momentum 0.99 and 3000-step warmdown
